title: Miconia asperiuscula
taxonomy: Miconia asperiuscula belongs to the family Melastomataceae. It is a species of flowering plant native to Central and South America. This plant is classified as a member of the order Myrtales. Miconia asperiuscula is further classified into the genus Miconia and the section Miconia. The species is characterized by its small, hairy leaves and white flowers.

The plant has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. It is said to possess antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its use in treating infections.
